summary: Tested HandoffSummary Edit functionality, backend pillar handoff endpoint, and pillar detection. Backend endpoints work correctly. Found critical issue: currentPillar state defaults to 'celebrate' and is NEVER updated, causing all requests to fallback to celebrate pillar when detection fails.

minor.issue: Intent detection for 'Looking for a groomer' returns 'General' instead of 'Grooming'. Missing pattern for 'groomer' as standalone word.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: In MiraDemoPage.jsx line 193, currentPillar state is initialized to 'celebrate' and setPillar() is NEVER called anywhere in the code. This causes ALL requests to default to 'celebrate' when pillar detection from conversation context fails.

issues: 9 instances of 'Concierge' without ® symbol (found 15 with ® and 9 without)

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Change line 193 in MiraDemoPage.jsx from useState('celebrate') to useState('general') to fix default pillar bug
BETTER FIX: Add setPillar() call in handleSubmit or elsewhere to update currentPillar based on detected intent/pillar from conversation
Add 'groomer' pattern to INTENT_PATTERNS in mira_service_desk.py GROOM_PLAN regex: r'\bgroomer\b'
critical_code_review_comments: Line 193: const [currentPillar, setPillar] = useState('celebrate') - setPillar is declared but NEVER used anywhere in the component, causing pillar to always be 'celebrate' by default
The pillar detection logic in showHandoffSummary (lines 2779-2847) works correctly, but it initializes detectedPillar from currentPillar which is always 'celebrate'
HandoffSummary component is correctly implemented with Edit button, pillar dropdown, and properly passes edited data to parent

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Mira demo page crashes browser

seed_data_creation: Test tickets created with TEST- prefix during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend handoff endpoint works correctly - accepts pillar and request_title fields. The main issue is in MiraDemoPage.jsx line 193 where currentPillar defaults to 'celebrate' but setPillar is never called. HandoffSummary component Edit button implementation looks correct - test manually after fixing the pillar state issue.
verified_working: Backend correctly stores edited pillar in ticket document
HandoffToConciergeRequest model has pillar and request_title fields
HandoffSummary component has correct data-testid attributes for Edit button, pillar select, notes textarea
Grooming intent detection works for 'grooming', 'groom', 'bath', 'haircut' keywords
rca_of_the_issue: Root Cause: currentPillar state variable is initialized to 'celebrate' on line 193 of MiraDemoPage.jsx, but setPillar() function is never called anywhere in the component. This means the pillar fallback is always 'celebrate'. The pillar detection logic in showHandoffSummary correctly detects pillar from conversation keywords, but if no keywords match, it falls back to currentPillar which is always 'celebrate'. Fix: Either change default to 'general' OR call setPillar() when intent is detected from /api/mira/route_intent response.
